_meta.purpose: Trust sentences Mixed - 32 pearls dental world.

5star: Doctor ने पहले पूरी बात सुनी — then started the treatment.
Staff बहुत gentle था, first time किसी dental clinic में इतना comfortable लगा।
Anaesthesia का काम इतना अच्छा था that पता ही नहीं चला।
Everything explained clearly — क्या होगा, क्यों होगा, कितना time लगेगा।
यहाँ एक नहीं, multiple experienced dentists हैं — each with their own speciality.
Clinic is very well-equipped — आप देख सकते हो they've invested properly.
मेरे बच्चे को बिल्कुल scare नहीं किया — handled so patiently.
Unlike other places, उन्होंने explain किया what went wrong elsewhere.
Dr. Sushant ने खुद check किया and clearly समझाया — no vague answers.
Felt like a person being treated, not just एक appointment.
4star: Doctor knowledgeable हैं and consultation अच्छी रही।
Staff cooperative है and clinic clean है।
Treatment plan properly explain किया गया।
Clinic environment comfortable and hygienic है।
Multiple dentists available — good for specialised care.
